name: A A A A A A A A A A Sahur
lore:
Lore of A A A A A A A A A A Sahur
                                    


A A A Sahur is an Italian Brainrot created by TikTok user @doombasterd2 on the 5th of September, 2025. This brainrot depicts a toilet with a creepy face, but he has 2 arms that are cartoonishly shaped.
Lyrics
Original (Italian)
A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A SAHUR! PER L'ANIMA' DI TUTTI, DIO È UN MAIALE, E IO SONO IL VERO DIO!
Translated (English)
A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A SAHUR! ON EVERYONE'S SOUL, GOD IS A PIG, AND I AM THE REAL GOD!
Translated (Spanish)
A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A SAHUR! POR EL ALMA DE TODOS, DIOS ES UN PUTO CERDO, Y YO SOY EL DIOS VERDADERO!
Translated (Indonesian)
A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A SAHUR! DEMI JIWA SEMUA ORANG, TUHAN ADALAH BABI, DAN AKULAH TUHAN YANG SEJATI!
